caption: An aerial view captures a cityscape bordering a large body of water under a cloudy sky. The urban area is filled with various buildings, including several high-rise structures and a prominent clock tower. In the distance, a coastline meets the water, and a small aircraft is visible flying across the horizon from left to right. The text "TIGER REAL ESTATE LLC" is superimposed across the top center of the scene in a serif font. As the sequence progresses, the camera remains static, and the only movement is the steady flight of the airplane as it traverses the cityscape toward the right side of the frame. No people are visible in the shot, and the lighting remains consistent across the urban environment and the overcast sky.
